user.title: Combined Notifications
user.description: Create a new notification sensor. You can configure conditions and appearance after setup.

data_description.name: Lowercase, underscores only, no spaces. This becomes your sensor entity ID.
data_description.friendly_sensor_name: Optional — shown in dashboards instead of the sensor name.

error.already_configured: A sensor with this name already exists.
error.invalid_name: Name must contain at least one valid character (letters, numbers, underscores).

init.title: Configure Combined Notifications
init.description: Use the Configure button in Devices & Services to open the full configuration panel.
